mapper.insert: insert into streamer_tier (tournament_no, streamer_no, tier_position, tier_name) values(#{tournamentNo},#{streamerNo},#{tierPosition},#{tierName})
mapper.select: select st.*, s.streamer_name from streamer_tier st join streamer s on st.streamer_no = s.streamer_no join tier_grade tg on st.tier_name = tg.tier_name where st.tournament_no = #{tournamentId} order by tg.tier_order asc, st.streamer_no asc
